title: Add donation button to store

requirements.text: Add a donation button to the store header navigation that is visible to all users

quotes: add a button to our store: donate button

acceptanceCriteria: Donation button is visible in the Header component alongside other navigation elements
Button is styled consistently with the existing UI theme
Button is accessible to both authenticated and non-authenticated users

requirements.text: Create a donation page that allows users to enter a custom donation amount and select a payment method (Stripe or Coinbase ICP)

quotes: add a button to our store: donate button

acceptanceCriteria: Page includes an input field for custom donation amount with validation
Payment method selection matches existing checkout flow (Stripe and Coinbase ICP options)
Clear call-to-action button to process the donation
Responsive design consistent with existing pages

requirements.text: Implement backend donation processing endpoint that creates a donation transaction record and handles payment processing through Stripe or Coinbase

quotes: add a button to our store: donate button

acceptanceCriteria: New donation method in main.mo that accepts amount and payment method
Integrates with existing Stripe payment flow for card donations
Integrates with existing Coinbase ICP flow for crypto donations
Returns transaction confirmation similar to order processing
Stores donation records with timestamp, amount, and payment method

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks for donation operations including creating donations and fetching donation history
acceptanceCriteria: useDonation mutation hook for creating donations
useDonationHistory query hook for fetching user's donation history
Proper query invalidation after successful donation
Loading and error states handled consistently with existing hooks

requirements.text: Add donation section to the Orders page showing user's donation history with amount, date, and payment method
acceptanceCriteria: Separate tab or section in OrdersPage for viewing donations
Displays donation amount, timestamp, and payment method used
Shows empty state when user has no donations
Styled consistently with order history display

constraints: Reuse existing Stripe and Coinbase payment integration logic
Do not modify useInternetIdentity.ts or useActor.ts hooks
Follow existing UI component patterns from the codebase
nonGoals: Third-party donation platform integrations beyond existing Stripe/Coinbase
